file_description: Data dictionary describing column names, decription, and units for the four data files.
Raw data for fungal mat growth and relative growth rates in the TRACE plots.
Colonization status and time to leaf colonization of two fungi species in the TRACE plots.
Number of dry days per week calculated from rainfall at Sabana Field Research Station.
Average soil temperature from experimental warming plots at TRACE project. Includes one soil depth (0.5 cm).
Average soil temperature from experimental warming plots at TRACE project. Includes one soil depth (0.5 cm). Adds Latitude and Longitude columns (LBNL site coordinates; same for all plots).
